Savings, Efficiency and Sustainability

The key to the success of Goodpack’s mission is that it forms the essence of our brand and customer delivery model. This powerful message is instilled in every transaction, product movement and action that our people and partners undertake. 

We aim to exceed our customers’ expectations and are driven to succeed for all stakeholders as a collective.

With a global network of drop-off and pick-up locations, more than 7 million global movements annually, operations in 80 countries and more than 4.3 million active returnable containers - our customers can rest assured that their products will be transported with the highest level of care and get where they need to go on time and within budget.

Name: RightShip
Description:
At RightShip we provide expertise in global safety, sustainability and social responsibility best practice to the maritime industry. 

Our unrivalled combination of years of seafaring expertise, vast access to data, analytics and an intuitive digital platform means we offer pertinent, balanced insights to our customer across the maritime ecosystem, supporting them on a journey to zero harm.

By this we mean zero harm to ships, to the cargo those ships carry, to the seafarers diligently carrying out their duties on board, and of course, zero harm to the environment the vessels are trading in.

Actively incorporating Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) metrics spanning marine emissions and pollution, crew welfare and ship safety into the solutions we offer, are all essential elements of a zero harm vision.

We’re dedicated to supporting our customers to meet government and industry emission reduction targets, decarbonisation and air quality initiatives through our GHG rating, Carbon Accounting tool and Maritime Emissions Portal. 

Our Safety Score, vettings and inspections services highlight the importance of good safety practices on board and support the industry in striving for excellence. 

Finally, our Crew Welfare Self-Assessment demonstrates the ambition that weaves through everything we do - that each seafarer should return home safely from their voyage, thanks to well-managed working environments supporting the health and wellbeing of every crew member. 

At RightShip, we’ve seen an increasing demand for transparency and verifiable data. Our insights, and the truth they provide are collated and measured by our experts. Vitally, this means that those results can also be managed, allowing the maritime industry certainty that it’s making progress towards a safe, sustainable and socially conscious future.

Name: Portcast
Description:
Portcast is a predictive supply chain visibility platform that helps manufacturers and logistics providers reduce delays, control costs, and manage disruptions before they escalate.

Key features include real-time tracking for containers, vessels, and air cargo, visibility into port and terminal events, carrier updates, shipping performance insights, emissions reporting, and automated freight audits powered by AI.

Using a global data network and proprietary machine learning, Portcast delivers accurate ETA and ETD predictions, identifies the root causes of delays, and sends proactive alerts through dashboard or API. This enables teams to act early, handle exceptions effectively, and move toward a more touchless supply chain.

Name: Singapore Logistics Association (SLA)
Description:
Established as the Singapore Freight Forwarders Association in 1973, the association was renamed Singapore Logistics Association (SLA) in 1999 to reflect the growth and wide-ranging activities of its members. Today, SLA has about 700 members comprising not only the logistics enterprises but also a growing number of companies from the wider logistics ecosystem. The association stays anchored in its mission to sustain a vibrant community through active industry participation and collaborations with both local and international partners. 

Offering a wide range of targeted programmes and initiatives to help enterprises be future ready, SLA also constantly reviews and explores forward-looking initiatives to help logistics enterprises implement business transformation improvements to emerge stronger and ahead of competition. In alignment with global sustainability goals, SLA supports the adoption of sustainable practices by encouraging members to explore green solutions that contribute to a more environmentally friendly sector. 

To nurture a pipeline of global and future ready logistics talents for the industry, The Logistics Academy, a wholly owned subsidiary training arm of SLA was incorporated in 2010 to provide human capital and skills development courses to empower and deepen the skills of the workforce for the logistics sector.

DiMuto redefines AgriTrade with AI, Data Visibility, and Finance — Using tech to create and connect a sustainable, global AgriTrade ecosystem. 

With our three pillars of Marketplace, Trade Management, and Trade Financing, DiMuto supports every aspect of AgriFood trading, redefining the way goods are managed from farm to table, seamlessly and simply connecting every step, and making it visible throughout. 

DiMuto was founded by Gary Loh after a decade of running a global fruit & vegetable company. 

Frustrated with the way global food trade was conducted he decided things need to change for the better. DiMuto aims to solve the global issue of food resilience and supply chain inefficiencies. 

By traders for traders, we want to help AgriFood business owners optimize their operations efficiently and for them to build a foundation of trust between their buyers or sellers so that they can take action on improving and growing their businesses in a more sustainable, efficient manner.

Maximizing Business Efficiency, Minimizing Impact on The Planet. 

Since 2019, DiMuto has successfully tracked and traced over millions of pieces in produce and millions in dollars of trade value on our platform, working with a global portfolio of clients in over ten countries and five continents. Name: AGX
Description:
Look around you. >90% of the things you see have been in a shipping container at some point. Surprisingly, while being a 500+ billion-dollar industry, 80% of the market is still dominated by small and medium-sized freight forwarders. 

They mostly organize shipments via countless back and forth emails. AGX helps these forwarders take a step forward and digitalize themselves to compete with emerging digital and global players. We provide them with the digital toolset to keep their backs free so they can focus on their superior operational service offering.

The AGX platform replaces endless email chains, countless excel sheets and complicated carrier websites with a virtual one file solution for schedules, bookings, tracking, exception based task management and allocation visibility for forwarders and your international agents - regardless of which TMS they are using. 

Our vision is to standardize information exchange in international logistics like the container did for shipping!

We are a team uniting decades of experience in SME-, and digital forwarding, tech, and consulting. We are based around the world with centers of gravity in Germany and Hong (further ones coming up).

GAC Singapore offers a complete range of shipping services and is a single point of contact for all logistics services needs. Singapore is also home to GAC’s Asia Pacific Regional office, Hub Agency Centre and GAC Bunker Fuels.

As one of the biggest ship agents in Singapore, we offer a complete range of ship agency services and actively manage all types of port calls, from load & discharge, cruise and bunker only calls, through to OPL and dry dockings. Our service coverage includes all anchorage and holding areas, ports, terminals and repair yards across Singapore. In addition, GAC Singapore is a single point of contact for all logistics services needs. From sea and air freight, ship spares delivery, events and project logistics to warehousing and distribution, GAC Singapore offers our clients end-to-end supply-chain solutions.

GAC Singapore is a key Hub Agency Centre covering hub agency services to ships throughout the Asia Pacific region. The island-state is also home to GAC Bunker Fuels (reflecting its position as one of the world's most important bunkering ports) and specialised provider, GAC Events Asia.

Name: SIPMM - Singapore Institute of Purchasing and Materials Management
Description:
The Singapore Institute of Purchasing and Materials Management (SIPMM) is the nation’s professional body for the LPS sector - the sector which includes professionals in Logistics, Procurement and Supply Chain. Since its founding in 1972, SIPMM has trained over 100,000 LPS professionals through its comprehensive suite of Specialised Qualifications, Executive Development Programmes as well as Specialised In-House Workshops across the region - which includes Multinational Firms, ICT Conglomerates, Governments, and the Armed Forces.
 
SIPMM is best recognised for founding the Official Singapore Purchasing Managers’ Index (PMI) in 1998, and co-founding the Official China PMI in 2002. The Official Singapore PMI is the key barometer of the Singapore Manufacturing Economy, while the Official China PMI is widely regarded as a reliable indicator of the China Manufacturing Economy.
 
SIPMM co-founded the International Federation of Purchasing and Materials Management (now known as the International Federation of Purchasing and Supply Management) in 1974 and has actively collaborated with industry chambers such as the China Federation of Logistics and Purchasing, the Singapore Procurement Federation and the National Trades Union Congress.
 
With over 4 decades of Progressive Professional Development in Singapore and the region, SIPMM is committed to supporting professionals and organisations be Future-Ready for the Future Economy.
Primary Industry: Transportation, Logistics, Supply Chain and Storage

Name: OptimusChain
Description:
Optimus Foundation (Optimus) is a decentralized logistics ecosystem that uses blockchain to solve a number of key challenges in the industry including lack of trust, low transparency, and complex settlement processes. Optimus is developing the Optimus Chain to create an ultra-secure, trustless network that leverages smart contracts, a privacy preserving ledger, and a stable cryptographic payment system.

The Optimus Chain is a protocol that will serve as a general solution framework for all stakeholders in the logistics industry. It will create a trust layer where currently none exists and will use state-of-the art blockchain technologies to support real-world business transactions with lower cost and higher efficiency. It will also serve as a platform for the development of many powerful decentralized applications (DApps) tailored to the logistics industry.

Name: Airdely Technologies Pte Ltd
Description:
Inspired by the emerging trend of shared economy and crowd sourcing, AIRDELY TECHNOLOGIES PTE LTD (AIRDELY) is established to build on the crowd shipping concept, leveraging on peer-to-peer delivery by providing a platform to match air courier needs to the social activity of air traveling. 
AIRDELY aspires to revolutionise the courier industry by providing a mobile application and website for booking and registration for both customer (parcel sender) and air traveler supported by automated task assignment matching software to deliver parcel fast and cheap and at the same time for the air traveller to earn money whenever they fly. AIRDELY is revolutionising the travel and courier industry, making overseas travel inexpensive and fun to travel, turning a cost centre into a potential earning and profit centre. Air traveller will be able to monetise their unused luggage allowances by carrying parcels for AIRDELY’s customers.
AIRDELY is the first mover using this concept in the courier industry and we aim to be the best in the industry. AIRDELY aims to be a global, multi-nation, multi-cities company, with collection centres in most airports and deliveries to all areas globally.
•	AIRDELY can achieve a much faster delivery timeline at a lower cost even for last minute delivery then most of the bigger and more established courier companies. By leveraging on the travellers’ destinations, it opens up the number of destinations available for delivery. Personal care and handling of the parcels by the air traveller himself.
•	AIRDELY will help the air travellers to optimise his unused luggage allowances to carry parcels meant for their destined airport for a given fee, according to the weight and value of the parcels which they are carrying. Thus, creating an all-win situation for all parties, the air travellers can earn extra allowances even though on a social activity, the customer is able to deliver his parcel at a shorter time frame and at a lower cost.

Name: Integra Shipping (1987) Pte Ltd
Description:
Incorporated in 1987, ‘Integra Shipping Pte Ltd’ started off as a Singapore Based Freight Forwarder, offering General Shipping services to Worldwide Destinations.

Over the years, Integra Shipping has developed a niche market and has since earned the reputation for being a ‘Cargo Specialist for Mainland China’ 

When the ‘Door of China’ opened widely to the rest of the world in 1990, and due to the economic reform, shipping volume increased tremendously. 

Integra Shipping’s expertise is called on regularly in Support of Project Cargo Movement for this region. The Expert Support includes Mobilisation of Vessels, Lifting and Transport Equipment to move Heavy Machineries, Plants and Oversized Cargoes. We also provide Door to Door Services even for such big Project Cargoes. Integra Shipping manages the Projects from Shipper’s Premise, Customs Clearance and delivery up to Consignee’s Site. 

Considering the increasing volumes and Risks Assessment, Integra Shipping’s management decided to incorporate another Company to share the Risks! As the saying goes, ‘Not to put All Eggs into 1 Basket”!

Thus, a sister company ‘Integra 2002 Pte Ltd’ was formed in 2002. ‘Integra 2002’ will continue to spearhead LCL Consolidation, FCL Services & General Freight Forwarding business. 

‘Integra Shipping’ will continue to concentrate and focus on Project Cargo Management & International Sea & Air Freight Forwarding and the Legend continues.

‘Integra Shipping’ was re-named in 2003 to now known as ‘Integra Shipping (1987) Pte Ltd’ to mark its' establishment

Services included:
-Project cargo movement

-Ship Chartering

-Transportation and Warehousing

Name: TCI Express Pte Ltd
Description:
TCI Express Pte Ltd is the international arm of TCI Express Ltd. (TCIEXPRESS)

TCIEXPRESS is a multi-specialist and leader in Express distribution in India. Established in 1996, as one of the foremost divisions of Transport Corporation of India Limited (TCIL), TCIEXPRESS demerged to become an independent company listed on NSE and BSE inspired by the emerging demand of door-to-door express services in post GST era and a growing need to enhance operational focus and accountability that places customer satisfaction above all. Being a young, vibrant yet experienced logistics provider, TCIEXPRESS has honed itself with advanced technology and deep domain-expertise to offer customised solutions for express delivery.

TCIEXPRESS has been growing rapidly with its wide distribution network locally and globally with its current 650 owned centres covering more than 40,000 locations. TCIEXPRESS is well equipped to offer time-definite solutions to 704 out of 712 districts in India with its wide spectrum of services comprising surface, domestic and international air, e-commerce, priority and reverse express services. Known in the industry for on-time delivery services, TCIEXPRESS makes it a reality by following well-connected routes for prompt movement of cargo through hub & spoke distribution model.

The key focus sectors for TCIEXPRESS include consumer electronics, retail, apparel & lifestyle, automobile, pharmaceuticals, engineering, e-commerce, energy/power, and telecommunication. TCIEXPRESS has also established itself as a priority express service provider in the e-commerce B2C deliveries market with its customised services and strong footprint. One of the biggest strength of TCIEXPRESS are its 2900 highly skilled employees and 650 offices with state-of-the-art technology across countries.

Name: Chasen Holdings Limited
Description:
The Chasen Group traced its beginning all the way back to the 1990s when Mr Yap Koon Bee @ Louis Yap formed a partnership, Chasen Logistics Services, with two other partners to provide general logistics services such as the supply of labour for the stuffing and unstuffing of containers, packing and warehousing. 

This business was formally incorporated as Chasen Logistics Services Pte Ltd ("CLSPL") in 1999 and the initial partnership was dissolved. In 2001, the labour supply business was discontinued to focus on the business of moving machinery and equipment for manufacturing companies and other businesses setting up operations in Singapore, relocating to new premises within Singapore as well as those moving their operations out of Singapore. 

A significant milestone occurred in February 2007 when Chasen Holdings Limited was listed on the SGX-SESDAQ (now known as Catalist) via a reverse takeover of China Entertainment Sports Ltd.

Through the years, Chasen has expanded from being a specialist relocation solutions provider to a sponsored Catalist-listed Investment Holding Company on the Singapore Exchange. The Group businesses have since extend further up the supply chain to include third party logistics, technical and engineering services in Singapore, Malaysia, People’s Republic of China, Vietnam and Timor-Leste. The diversified revenue sources cover industries such as wafer fabrication, TFT display panel production, semi-conductor, chip testing & assembly, solar panel assembly, consumer electronics, telecommunications, marine, ordnance and construction sectors.

Yet another significant development happened when Chasen Holdings Limited was transferred from the Catalist to the Mainboard on the Singapore Exchange in February 2013.

Description:
MLS Logistic Services Pte Ltd (MLS) provides distribution services to the healthcare industry in Singapore. Its core services include Warehousing, Inventory Management, Customer Order Processing, Picking-Packing, Delivery, Invoicing and Payment Collection. Operating under a Good Distribution Practice (GDP) license issued by the Health Science Authority of Singapore (HSA), key processes are already in place to ensure accuracy and traceability of the products that are being fulfilled to all the customers. The company uses SAP Business One as the core enterprise system which was only implemented earlier this year. With it, MLS is able to customize various processes and reports to your business needs. Flexibility can be achieved without compromising on the healthcare regulatory requirements.
MLS’s current customer drop points include all hospitals, polyclinics and major specialist clinics. Over the last couple of months, it has expanded to home care patients due to business growth and requirements. From scheduled to urgent deliveries, the goal is to ensure that they are fulfilled in a timely manner without any delay. Located in a centre location in Tai Seng, urgent request can be met within 2 hours to all parts of Singapore. In terms of delivery solutions, besides owning a fleet of vehicles, the company also engaged an outsourced partner to ensure that the last mile delivery is always completed within the stipulated timeframe.
looking into utilising systems and automation to improve on efficiencies and accuracies.some of the notable add-on systems include the Warehouse Management Scanning System and the Vehicle Tracking system. Another web-based order tracking portal is already in the pipeline to offer greater visibility and convenience for internal and external personnel. The goal of MLS is to be the Logistics partner in the Healthcare Industry through automation.

Name: Mandai Link Logistics Pte Ltd
Description:
Incorporated in Singapore in 2006, Mandai Link Logistics Pte Ltd (MLL) provides world-class cold storage warehousing and logistics services for a wide variety of goods, across a range of temperatures, while complying with all regulations. MLL also offers a full range of shipping and logistics services, from port clearance to handling government-initiated inspections to trucking and delivery to procurement and inventory management. 


MLL manages and operates a cold chain storage facility with a capacity of 25,000 Metric Tons, enough for storing up to 1,000 40-foot container loads of food, making it Singapore’s largest fully-automated cold storage facility. Coupled with a throughput of over 100 pallets of goods per hour, MLL is one of the most efficient warehouses in Singapore.

In July 2014, Mandai Link Logistics (MLL) was awarded the ISO 22301: 2012. Better known as the ISO certification for Business Continuity Management (BCM), this ISO standard recognizes Mandai Link as a company that is more than adequately prepared to service its customers even if a declared 'disaster' strikes. 


Mandai Link has also been awarded the Zero GST Type II License. In-line with the company's effort to serve its customers better, MLL has been licensed by Singapore Customs as a "Bonded Warehouse". Mandai Link is essentially a free-trade zone where customers are able to use it as a trans-shipment cold-storage hub for Import and Export, into and out of Singapore. 

As of August 2015, we are also awarded Grade A status from AVA for the 7th consecutive year. We have also been lauded with the Innovative Logistics Specialist Award from Promising SME 2015. These awards and accreditations are an affirmation of our strive and dedication for operational and service excellence to our valued customers.

Contact us at +65 6755 8758 or email us at enquiry@mandailink.com

Name: Aspac Aircargo Services Pte Ltd
Description:
• Our entire chain of operations runs in the Free Trade Zone (FTZ) at Changi Airfreight Centre. Our presence here allows us to work closely with airlines and Ground Handling Agents. These enable us to deliver intermodal transshipment services and reasonably cut down on our entire freight forwarding process.

• In situations where the client can't readily take possession of their cargo due to the delivery location is closed or unattainability of import license, we can clear the goods out from airport cargo terminal first and then store it in our FTZ warehouse, which is way cheaper than the fees incurred at the terminal.

• We fully own and operate our fleet of trucks. Import clearance at the airport cargo terminal can take place anytime, and delivery to the end customer can be as little as 6 hours right after the flight’s arrival. Similarly, for exports, our lead time for cargo collection and transfer into the terminal can be as little as 6 hours too.

• We do not know what it means to be "closed for the day." We are one of the few freight forwarders from among hundreds that stay on 24/7, all day, every day, including Sundays and public holidays. Do you need proof? We can arrange a visitor's pass for our clients to come in and see us at work anytime.

• We run a few brokerage services - the whole enchilada of customs related issues and air freight works. When it comes to securing all the requisite cargo clearance permits, certificate of origin, licenses from Customs, or the various regulatory agencies, we leverage on our team experienced. 

• Our airfreight broker department has a direct working relationship with hundreds of airlines. Our trade volume enables us to offer a variety of competitive airfreight rates to exporters. If you happen to ship to a particular destination often or have very heavy tonnage, you can leverage our partnership with airlines to negotiate for lower or contract rates.

Name: VS LOGISTICS & SHIPPING
Description:
VS LOGISTICS & SHIPING (VSLS) has extensive track record in project logistics serving customers in the offshore, oil & gas and heavy industries. Our project team with good technical and operational skills ensures the job is done cost-effectively using innovative transport combination and technology. We have handled different types of heavy and out of gauge cargoes including, Transformer, Boilers, Risers with Buoyancy, Silos Tank, Ship Cranes, Helicopter AW, , to name just a few. Commitment, flexibility and experience are central to our approach to every project, whether it be a single shipment or the execution of a global EPC contract.

Our facility at Westport, Pulau Indah port facilitates cross border shipments mainly between Malaysia and Singapore and Malaysia and Thailand. Our Labuan facility supports the offshore oil and gas activities with regular loadouts and back loads with supplies to and from rigs.
Our flexible project logistics services include:

Site survey and feasibility studies (routes, weather, political climate)
Computer aided loading plans
Full / part charter parties (air charters, time/ voyage charters)
Multi-modal transport (rail, tug & barge, heavy lift)
Special equipment transport (flat racks, open tops, platforms, tween deck solutions)
Freight negotiation (COA negotiation, long term rate validities)
Administrative support (customs clearance, trade documentation)
In-house flexible IT solutions and tracking and tracing
Air / Sea charter for break bulk cargo
With many years of experience in the project cargo market, VSLS has built up considerable expertise and contacts with owners and operators all over the world. This has given us the opportunity to become substantially involved in competitive chartering for both air and sea.

With VSLS, you can be sure that your project cargo is in good hands with complete transparency. Your shipment will be under our control and compliant with our Group’s strict HSSE, Quality and Compliance policies from start

Name: Lee Hoe Transport Pte Ltd
Description:
Lee Hoe Transport has been in the cross-border freight forwarding business since 1963. During the span of more than 50 years, the company has gained a strong and reliable reputation in the industry.

The core business of the company is land freight forwarding – which is to provide cross-border trucking services for goods and cargoes between Singapore to Malaysia and from Kuala Lumpur to Singapore.

Our freight forwarding services include the collection, distribution and point-to-point deliveries of goods and cargoes from Singapore to Malaysia and from Kuala Lumpur to Singapore. The company has its Malaysia office located at Cheras, Kuala Lumpur, with an associate office in Johor Bahru to support its operations throughout West Malaysia. Its Kuala Lumpur office coordinates and manages all trucking and deliveries to other destinations like Melaka, Kuantan, Kuala Trengganu and Penang.

Lee Hoe Transport has clients ranging from public listed companies to small and medium enterprises. Some of these companies have been its long-time customers for more than 20 years. It has established a lasting and trusting business relationship along the way – a testament to its dedicated and trusted customer service to clients.

Name: GO-GENIE
Description:
GO-GENIE is a smart logistics ecosystem that delivers visibility, scalability, and opportunity by leveraging technology and the magic of collaboration.

Founded in Singapore, our mission is to transform fragmented and underutilized logistics networks into optimized, efficient systems — enabling businesses of all sizes to scale seamlessly while reducing costs and environmental impact.

At GO-GENIE, we’re passionate about building a smarter, greener, and more connected logistics landscape. By fostering collaboration across the ecosystem — connecting people, processes, and technologies — we help unlock new levels of agility and efficiency.

Our platform offers intuitive, user-friendly tools that simplify complex logistics operations. From fulfillment and warehousing to last-mile delivery, every feature is designed with ease of use, time-saving, and scalability in mind — allowing teams to operate more efficiently and focus on what matters most.

Sustainability is at the core of everything we do. By optimizing delivery routes, minimizing empty runs, and promoting smarter resource utilization, we help our partners reduce their carbon footprint while growing responsibly.

We also believe in uplifting the people who keep the system moving — our delivery heroes — by equipping them with the flexibility, tools, and support they need to succeed in today’s fast-paced environment.

GO-GENIE isn’t just a tool — it’s a movement toward better, smarter, and more sustainable logistics for all.

Name: CarPal
Description:
CarPal was one of the pioneering on-demand logistics service based on the sharing economy in Singapore. Through its revolutionary urban logistics & on-demand delivery platform, businesses and consumers could connect real-time with local couriers, who delivered goods or run errands on their behalves anywhere in a city. CarPal opened a new world where local supply chain management and analytics became a breeze and fun to operate.

Over the years, CarPal had steadily grown into a popular and reliable last-mile delivery service for consumers and businesses alike, delivering anything from fresh food, flowers, household items to furnitures. Tapping into a pool of over 10,000 freelance drivers with a wide spectrum of vehicles, CarPal maintained a high quality of service through extensive driver onboarding process, driver performance management and unparalleled customer support.

In late 2016, CarPal launched “CarPal Fleet” - a cloud-based enterprise technology that allowed businesses to have a transparent overview of last-mile delivery while managing an adaptive hybrid fleet, giving businesses the tool to compete with the likes of Amazon or Uber. The platform provided a fully-customized service, giving businesses a better control of all elements related to last-mile delivery. Some of the key features included order monitoring, live tracking, route optimization, API integrations, data and analytics, etc.

The company was acquired by HH VC Investments in 2021 and operations ceased subsequently.
Primary Industry: Transportation, Logistics, Supply Chain and Storage

Name: C-TANK GLOBAL PTE LTD
Description:
In 1998, against the backdrop of a dynamic global logistics landscape, Mr. Edgar Pu founded Celeritytank Logistics (China) LTD. with a vision to revolutionize chemical logistics. What started as a traditional freight forwarder service for chemical exports has evolved into a powerhouse in tank container operations.
 
Building on this legacy of excellence, C-Tank Global Logistics emerged in 2018 as an independent entity. Founded by Edgar Pu, C-Tank Global Logistics took the helm with a renewed vision and commitment to redefine the boundaries of smart logistics.
 
From its inception, the company, driven by innovation and commitment, embraced the challenges of transporting chemical products with diverse packaging. Today, C-Tank Global logistics is not just a logistics provider; it's a global force, operating in over 50 locations worldwide.
 
Our journey has been marked by milestones that showcase our expertise in ISO tank containers, flexi-tanks, and drums, offering a "One Stop" solution to meet the intricate needs of chemical manufacturers, distributors, and 4PL providers. As ISO Tank Operators, we specialize in the business of carrying liquid bulk cargoes, handling both hazardous and non-hazardous chemicals.
 
 
With a fleet of 2800 ISO Tank containers, including specialized T11, T14, T20, T50, and T75 units, we've set industry standards. The heart of our success lies in our global network. We have five operation offices worldwide, strategic partnerships with industry leaders like Lanfer Logistics in Europe and Seaspeed Container Line in the Indian Sub-continent, and a robust network of over 50 delivery/sales agents.
 
 
As we navigate the intricate world of chemical logistics, we remain dedicated to providing global solutions, setting industry standards, and ensuring the safe and timely delivery of liquid bulk cargoes—both hazardous and non-hazardous. 
 
Join us as we continue to redefine the boundaries of logistics, one tank container at a time.

Name: FNC GROUP- International Forwarder & Logistic Network
Description:
FNC Group - Connecting Freight Forwarders for Business Growth and Collaboration

Are you a freight forwarder looking to expand your network and grow your business? Look no further than FNC Group, a highly respected freight network connecting forwarders from around the world.

What is FNC Group?
FNC Group is a reputed freight network that serves as a bridge, connecting freight forwarders across the globe under one roof to develop business prospects, international friendship, trust, and confidence among its members. Founded in 2004, the network has grown to include members from over 100 countries and is known for its commitment to building strong relationships among members and promoting business growth.

How does FNC Group work?
FNC Group works by providing a platform for members to connect with each other, share information, and collaborate on projects. To become a member, forwarders must apply and meet specific criteria, including demonstrating a good reputation in the industry and a commitment to quality and customer service. Once accepted, members gain access to a variety of benefits, including networking opportunities, collaboration on projects, training and education programs, and business referrals.

Why join FNC Group?
If you're a freight forwarder, there are several compelling reasons to join FNC Group:

Expand your network: FNC Group provides access to a global network of forwarders, helping you expand your business and increase your revenue.

Build relationships: FNC Group is committed to building strong relationships among its members, providing opportunities to connect with other forwarders and build valuable relationships.

Learn from others: FNC Group offers training and education programs to help members improve their skills and stay up-to-date on industry developments. By participating in these programs, you'll have the opportunity to learn from others and improve your business.

Referral opportunities: By referring business to other FNC Group membe

Declarators Pte Ltd is a multiple award winning declaring agent with a paid up capital of SGD500,000.

The organization was established with the aim of assisting our clients to reduce workload and manpower cost, while providing permit declaration solutions. Our highly professional permit declaration services brings forward the most professional and dedicated personnel using Singapore Customs approved declaration platforms.

We have also extended our services to provide on-board courier (handcarry), local courier/despatch deliveries via motorcycle and deployment of manpower for permit declaration, freight and logistics formalities islandwide Singapore.

OUR UNIQUENESS
We are the only service provider in Singapore dedicated to provide one-stop permit declarations, local despatch service and Carnet/COO applications altogether.

VISION
Declarators aspires to be Singapore’s fastest and most cost-efficient one-stop customs declaration solutions and local courier/despatch service provider to our clients.

MISSION
We offer the most competitive prices islandwide while providing value-added services to our clients. We ensure our client’s shipment to be custom cleared and their documents to be delivered within the fastest time at lowest cost. Declarators focus on five core values , “Reliability, Flexibility, Responsive, Speed & Accuracy”

Awards and Accolades

2) Britcham Finalist 2020 - Customer Service Provider of the Year

Name: Yew Choon Private Limited
Description:
Yew Choon, established as a private limited company in Singapore in 1975, specializes in integrated heavy lift transportation solutions both onshore and offshore.

Since 1979, we have expanded our offerings to become a comprehensive "one-stop transportation solution" provider in the heavy lift transportation sector. Tailoring our services, we provide customized heavy lifting and transport solutions to meet the international onshore/offshore needs of various industries.

Operating across Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Vietnam, Philippines, India, Bangladesh, China, Cambodia, Brunei, Sri Lanka, and Thailand, our clientele primarily consists of businesses in the oil and gas, petrochemical, and power generation sectors.

Our business operates through three core segments:

1. Onshore Services:
We offer onshore lifting and transportation solutions for general and exceptionally heavy cargoes and structures, encompassing heavy lift, modular land transport, and craneage. These services are flexible, catering to clients in power generation, oil, gas, and petrochemical industries, utilizing a range of equipment including crawlers/mobile cranes, self-propelled hydraulic trailers, lowbed and flatbed trailers, and lorry cranes.

2. Offshore Services:
Complementing our onshore heavy lift and transportation services, our offshore transportation services accommodate loads that cannot be transported onshore due to size, weight constraints, or other physical limitations. We facilitate marine transportation and offer barge/tug chartering services to address these requirements.

Additionally, our facilities include a 130m long waterfront area with a Ro-Ro jetty, enhancing our capabilities to serve our clients comprehensively.
Primary Industry: Transportation, Logistics, Supply Chain and Storage

Name: Park N Parcel
Description:
Park N Parcel is a business that offers convenient parcel delivery and storage solutions. Our goal is to bridge the gap between traditional courier services and the fast-paced urban lifestyle. We provide a unique approach to last-mile delivery and parcel management, catering to the evolving needs of individuals and businesses.

We have established a network of secure collection points in urban locations. These points act as collection and drop-off hubs for parcels, creating a decentralized system that maximizes convenience. Our locations include parking garages, retail stores, and other easily identifiable landmarks, making it effortless for people to send, receive, or store packages at their preferred time and location.

Customers can choose a convenient collection point during the online ordering process or opt for designated pickup points. Once the package arrives, customers receive notifications and can collect their parcels at a time that suits them best. This eliminates missed deliveries and long waiting times.

Park N Parcel also offers value-added services such as package consolidation and secure storage for items that customers may not have space for. We prioritize the safety and security of parcels, employing stringent measures to protect customers' belongings.

We collaborate with e-commerce platforms, retailers, and logistics companies to integrate our services seamlessly into existing supply chains. This optimization reduces costs and contributes to a more sustainable logistics ecosystem.

Park N Parcel aims to revolutionize parcel logistics. Through convenient storage points, flexible pickup options, and value-added services, we provide a hassle-free and reliable solution to the increasing demands of modern delivery.
